item.title: psystem
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Let's develop a simple particle system in python, from scratch.

item.title: Naming
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Join me on this video series coding a naming convention manager step by step, 10 minutes at a time.

item.title: mscreen
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Drawing OpenGL in Maya was never easier.

item.title: dgpy
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: A naive dependency graph implemented in python, coded live in a test-driven development fashion.

item.description: A flappy bird clone for your terminal

item.title: Driving serialization via dunder methods
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Article on how riglab's serialize/deserialize programmatic objects via serialized metadata and python magic methods.
